category.desc: Discover in detail all our {{category}} rooms.
category.empty: No rooms currently configured for this category.
category.why_title: Why stay in our {{category}} in Lomé?
category.why_p1: TOGOLIVING Residence offers you a unique experience in Lomé. By booking one of our {{category}}, you not only enjoy optimal comfort with modern amenities (air conditioning, high-speed WiFi, smart TV), but also a privileged location in the peaceful neighborhood of Kpogan Agbetsiko.
category.why_p2: An exceptional environment: Located just 100 meters from the natural beach, our seaside residence offers quick access to the Atlantic Ocean. Our guests particularly appreciate morning walks on the beach and spectacular sunsets from our panoramic pool.
category.why_p3: Services and Amenities: Staying with us means enjoying quality hotel services (regular cleaning, 24/7 security) while keeping the independence of an apartment. You will have access to our restaurant offering world flavors, as well as our leisure areas including a children's play area and billiards.
category.review: An unforgettable stay! The {{category}} was impeccably clean, spacious, and ideally located facing the sea. The staff is very caring and the restaurant offers excellent dishes. We will definitely come back.

hero.subtitle: Booking
hero.title: Confirm Your Stay
hero.desc: Fast confirmation via WhatsApp · No online payment

step2.title: Dates & Guests
step2.req_placeholder: Sea view desired, baby cot, airport transfer...

step4.title: Summary
step4.disclaimer: By clicking confirm, you will be redirected to WhatsApp to finalize your booking with the TOGOLIVING team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking.
faq.a1: Cancellations are free up to 48 hours before the scheduled arrival date. After this time, the first night will be charged.
faq.a2: Yes, we offer a VIP airport shuttle service on request. Please indicate this in the "Special requests" section when booking.
faq.a3: To ensure the comfort of all our guests, pets are unfortunately not allowed in the residence.

intro.p1: Offering a view of the city, the Togoliving Residence — rated 4-Star Hotel — is located in Toudji, perfectly situated along the National N2 road and only 100m from the natural beach. Kpogan is a quiet neighborhood, located on the national road leading from Benin to Ghana, near the Agbavi market.
intro.p2: It offers a restaurant, room service, a bar, a garden, and a terrace. It provides free fast Wi-Fi (516 Mbps) and private parking. The property serves a continental or American breakfast every morning.
intro.p3: Each accommodation includes a private bathroom with a shower, air conditioning, a flat-screen TV, and a refrigerator. The property is located 17 km from Lomé-Tokoin International Airport and offers an airport shuttle service (for a fee).
intro.p4: Postal Code: 36BP50 — Kpogan Agbetsiko, Lomé, Togo

hero.subtitle: Leisure & Relaxation
hero.title: Relax at TOGOLIVING
hero.desc: Between the ocean and a panoramic pool, enjoy a setting designed for rest, entertainment, and family moments.

pool.subtitle: Breathtaking view
pool.title: Panoramic Pool & Pool Bar
pool.desc: Dive into our large outdoor pool with an unobstructed view of the Atlantic Ocean. Whether for a refreshing morning swim or to relax at sunset with a cocktail in hand.
pool.b1: Adult pool and small children's pool
pool.b2: Pool bar with refreshment service directly in the water
pool.b3: Comfortable sun loungers and umbrellas to enjoy the sun

activities.subtitle: For all ages
activities.title: Play & Activity Areas
activities.games_desc: Enjoy our leisure area equipped with billiards, table football, and various board games for your evenings with friends or family.
activities.kids_desc: A specially designed playground for the little ones, under parental supervision, to have fun safely.
activities.garden_desc: Stroll through our tropical garden, enjoy the shaded patio or relax on the terrace overlooking nature.

beach.subtitle: The Ocean at your doorstep
beach.title: Natural Beach 100m away
beach.desc: Cross the road and you're there. The wild and unspoiled beach of Kpogan offers kilometers of fine sand for your morning walks, your jogging, or simply to listen to the sound of the waves.
